phase_history.notes: Real-time mix analyzer and web bridge for meetsnip.com. Pure pass-through — analyzes Dynamics (RMS/LUFS), Tonality (Spectral Balance), and Stereo Width (Correlation). Compares against genre profiles. Sends analysis snapshots to Snip API. Dark modern flat UI with pink/cyan accents inspired by meetsnip.com brand.

Complexity 4/5. Three analysis engines (LUFS, FFT Spectral, Stereo Correlation), genre comparison with 7 profiles, rule-based feedback generator, async HTTP bridge to meetsnip.com. Phased implementation: Phase 4.1.1 (Core + Measurement), Phase 4.1.2 (Genre Engine + Full UI), Phase 4.1.3 (API Integration + Polish).

v2 Premium CSS overhaul: deep black (#050505) background with vignette, glassmorphic panel gradients with top highlights, deeply embedded meters with inset shadows, neon glow fills with white cap lines, redesigned stereo arc (thin gradient + intensely glowing needle), LED text-shadow readouts, 3D layered send button with hover lift/press sink, spectral bars with per-bar deviation glow. Same 1000x500 4-column layout as v1.

All DSP engines implemented: LUFS (ITU-R BS.1770-4 K-weighting), 4096-pt FFT spectral analyzer, stereo correlation/width. 12 genre profiles with feedback scoring. WebView UI with bidirectional JUCE parameter binding (target_genre, analysis_window). Async HTTP POST to meetsnip.com. Pure pass-through, lock-free audio thread.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView selected for: (1) Rich data visualization requirements — real-time meters, spectral bars, correlation display, (2) Multi-line scrollable text feedback area, (3) HTTP API integration more natural from JS context, (4) Complex dark modern flat UI with animated elements, (5) Genre dropdown and dynamic content updates suit web UI patterns.
